roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DISCHARGE REPORT FILED - ANGER MGMT PROGRAM TERMINATION RPT FILED

/CAL:FILING OF APD MTR/CON:HARRIS TABACK/X:COURT ADMONISHES DEFENDANT REGARDING REPORTING AND STAYING IN CONTACT WITH PROBATION,/MTR-APD/PROB MOD/ADDL CTS:9/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE SWAP SENTENCE IN CUSTODY/PROB EXT:06-25-11/

/CAL:1203,2(A)PC MOTION/CON:JOHN LEE/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REIN ORIG TC/PROB MOD/PJ:90 DAYS/ADDL CTS:8/X:BALANCE OF TIME MY BE SERVED THROUGH SWAP, TREATMENT ON DEMAND,/SWAPD:02-22-10/PROB EXT:06-25-11/

/CAL:PRELIM HRG/AMEND:1/X:THE PEOPLE AMEND COUNT 1 TO HS11377(A), A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   1/DISM3/IBARRA/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 05-27-08/OR/DOP/X:6 MONTH HAMMER IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH COURT ORDERS

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:JOHN LEE    /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:05-07-08/987,2/BAIL:30,000/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT ON 4-25-08/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 5-6-08/DOP/
/SHER/NB/X:THE COURT WILL IMPOSE 6 MONTH HAMMER, DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER ELIGIBLE FOR CASE TO BE REDUCED TO MISDEMEANOR/CONT/
/CAL:SPR ELIG REPORT/LD:05-07-08/X:SPR IS DENIED/X:PRELIM ON 5-6-08 IS CONFIRMED/
